NOTICE SENT BY COURT. COUNSEL MAY FILE A DECLARATION, OR IF SANCTIONS PAID BY 03/03/23 THEN THE COURT WILL VACATE THE OSC DATE. SANCTIONS MAY BE PAID VIA E-FILING. Petition For Approval Of Compromise Of Claim Or Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor
Off Calendar Nov-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on calendar this day for approval of compromise of claim for Minor Talisha Flores.
Dept. 505: Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:09:56 a.m. and concluding at 9:31:15 a.m. (D505)

Edward M. Higginbotham, Esq. appearing for petitioner Jeannette Ortega who was present, placed under oath and testified.
Plaintiff Jairo Flores was present, placed under oath and testified.
Claimant Talisha Flores was present.

Petition for approval of compromise of claim filed August 3, 2023.
Order for appointment of Guardian Ad Litem filed May 9, 2023.

The Court goes over the breakdown of fees and costs.
Counsel to offer proof as to the 40% of the gross settlement as attorney's fees.
Plaintiff Jairo Flores testifies.
The court goes over the submitted exhibits attached to the petition.

The Court hereby APPROVES Plaintiff's Motion for Compromise of Claim for the settlement amount of $375,000.00 minus the following:

1. $147,400.61 for Attorney's Fees
2. $16,338.72 for medical expenses and costs

Balance of settlement in the sum of $190,059.45 shall be paid directly to Plaintiff Jairo Flores.

The gross amount paid to the Claimant minor Talisha Flores is $33,000.00 minus the following:

Proportionate costs $1,198.17
Attorney's fees $10,600.61

The balance of $21,201.22 is to be deposited into a blocked account on behalf the claimant minor Talisha Flores at Wells Fargo Bank, located at 3801 3rd Street, San Francisco, CA 94124.

Proposed order to be submitted for review and signature of the court.

Progress or compliance of the court's order to deposit money in the blocked account is set for January 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505.

Off Calendar Oct-11-2023 Continued To Nov-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Approval of Compromise of Claim or Action for Minor Talisha Flores.

Dept. 505; Judge: Lydia M. Villarreal; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Jaime; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:45:02 a.m., pausing at 10:48:42 a.m., commencing at 3:45:55 p.m. and concluding at 3:46:49 a.m.(D505)

No appearances by either party.

The Court took the matter off calendar at the first calling.

The Department received a phone call from the attorney of record for Petitioner and admitted that they advertently misunderstood the Court's order from that last hearing and respectfully request a continuance of the case.

The Court went back on record recalling its order of Off-Calendar.

Good cause appearing, the Court grants the request and continues the matter to November 17, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505
